parameters.query:
SELECT 
  p.project_number, p.name AS project_name, CONCAT(p.object_street, ', ', p.object_zip, ' ', p.object_city) AS address,
  s.id AS supplier_id, s.name AS supplier_name, s.short_name AS supplier_short,
  s.email AS supplier_email, s.phone AS supplier_phone,
  pmn.id AS need_id, pmn.label, pmn.total_quantity, pmn.quantity_unit,
  pmn.product_name, pmn.unit_price_net, pmn.notes,
  prod.sku, prod.name AS full_product_name
FROM project_material_needs pmn
JOIN projects p ON p.id = pmn.project_id
LEFT JOIN products prod ON prod.id = pmn.product_id
LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON s.id = prod.supplier_id
WHERE pmn.project_id = '{{ $('Parse Query Params').first().json.project_id }}'::uuid
  AND pmn.source = 'auto' AND pmn.status = 'planned'
ORDER BY s.name NULLS LAST, pmn.label;

UPDATE project_material_needs 
SET status = 'ordered', updated_at = NOW()
WHERE project_id = '{{ $('Parse Query Params').first().json.project_id }}'::uuid
  AND source = 'auto' AND status = 'planned';

INSERT INTO events (event_type, project_id, payload, source_system, source_flow)
VALUES (
  'MATERIALS_ORDER_SENT', 
  '{{ $('Parse Query Params').first().json.project_id }}'::uuid,
  json_build_object('orders_sent', {{ $('Group By Supplier').first().json.emailCount }})::jsonb,
  'n8n', 'M4_07_Order_Send'
) RETURNING id;

parameters.responseBody: =Bestellung {{ $('Parse Query Params').first().json.action === 'approve' ? 'genehmigt ✅' : 'abgelehnt ❌' }}. Du kannst dieses Fenster schließen.
